title: Ones
description:
The form of a natural number a in a number system with base p contains of n ones (digts "1") in a row.

Your task is to write a program that computes the greatest values of exponents of numbers 2 and 3 such that the remainder of a divided by both these values the remainder is 0.
input: Two values of natural numbers p (1 < p < 109) and n (n < 109) are input from the keyboard.
output: Two non-negative integer numbers must be output on the screen: the values of the greatest exponents of two and three.
source: Olympiad, Latvian olympiad in informatics, 11th Latvian olympiad in informatics, Stage III (Country)
